title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: Tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS CDK with Python to build a serverless REST API. Covers building with DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway, comparing CDK to CloudFormation and Terraform, and deploying infrastructure with a single command.
